component.name: Author Clipboard
component.summary: Native COSMIC clipboard manager with history, search, and security

description.p: Author Clipboard is a native clipboard manager for the COSMIC desktop environment. It monitors your clipboard history, provides instant full-text search, and keeps your sensitive data safe with automatic detection and optional encryption.

ul.li: Persistent clipboard history stored in SQLite with FTS5 full-text search
Sensitive content detection (passwords, API keys, tokens, SSH keys)
Screen lock integration — clear sensitive items on lock

description.p: Phase 12-18: FTS5 search, WAL mode, per-item TTL, dedup controls, GitHub Actions CI, systemd packaging, SECURITY.md, screen lock detection, deb packaging, snippets, denylist rules, and X11 detection.
Bug fixes: scroll position, layout, URI credential detection, IPC security hardening.
Phase 9-10: COSMIC native icons and advanced keyboard navigation.
